creator: kaihugoh@stud.ntnu.no
text:
Motherboard: Asus K8N-VM

Another update to my entry about the Asus K8N-VM.

Everything fully functional. Integrated NIC (nfe), Integrated audio (snd_hda) as well as ACPI and APIC works fine.

Fix:
